headline: Dividend King GPC Earnings on Deck: What the Upcoming Spinoff Means for Investors
summary: Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) reports Q1 2026 results on April 22, 2026, before the market opens. With a planned corporate split on the horizon and tariff headwinds unresolved, this quarter carries more strategic weight than a typical seasonal update. headline: Genuine Parts (GPC) Reports Q1: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
